heading: Procedures applicable to promulgation of rules by Commission
label: 2309 Procedures applicable to promulgation of rules by Commission

children.heading: Oral presentation
children.label: a Oral presentation
children.text: Any rule prescribed under this chapter shall be prescribed in accordance with ; except that the Commission shall give interested persons an opportunity for oral presentations of data, views, and arguments, in addition to written submissions. A transcript shall be kept of any oral presentation. Any such rule shall be subject to judicial review under in the same manner as rules prescribed under , except that shall not apply.section 553 of title 5section 57a(e) of this titlesection 57a(a)(1)(B) of this titlesection 57a(e)(3)(B) of this title

children.heading: Warranties and warranty practices involved in sale of used motor vehicles
children.label: b Warranties and warranty practices involved in sale of used motor vehicles
children.text: The Commission shall initiate within one year after , a rulemaking proceeding dealing with warranties and warranty practices in connection with the sale of used motor vehicles; and, to the extent necessary to supplement the protections offered the consumer by this chapter, shall prescribe rules dealing with such warranties and practices. In prescribing rules under this subsection, the Commission may exercise any authority it may have under this chapter, or other law, and in addition it may require disclosure that a used motor vehicle is sold without any warranty and specify the form and content of such disclosure.January 4, 1975
